response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team infrastructure work
Strong full-stack and polyglot skills with demonstrable impact on performance-critical systems
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentoring
Mobile platform experience is limited to iOS app maintenance, not ecosystem-wide tooling
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
